description_long: This advertising board consists of a rectangular sign panel supported by two sturdy cylindrical metal posts, each anchored with a circular base plate. The sign panel features a printed advertisement with a light beige background, a white rose graphic, and clear black text, including contact information and a website. The frame is metallic, likely steel or aluminum, with a smooth, glossy finish and rounded corners for safety and aesthetics. The sign is freestanding and designed to be placed on flat surfaces such as sidewalks or near building entrances. The construction appears robust, suitable for outdoor urban environments, and the panel is likely made of weather-resistant materials. No visible illumination features are present, and the board is intended for static printed advertisements.
description: A freestanding rectangular advertising board with a metallic frame, two cylindrical posts, and a printed sign featuring a white rose and contact information on a beige background.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full printed advertisement, metallic frame, and both supporting posts with circular bases.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign panel and the cylindrical shape of the supporting posts.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back of the sign panel and the metallic frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slimness of the panel and the alignment of the posts.
attribute_mounting_type: freestanding with metal posts and base plates
attribute_frame_design: thick metallic frame with rounded corners and cylindrical posts anchored by circular base plates
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed advertisement for a funeral service, featuring a white rose, text, and contact information
